inputs.label: Sample Mean
inputs.businessContext: Arithmetic mean of the sample data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Arithmetic mean of the sample data.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne arithmétique des données de l'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: Media aritmética de los datos de la muestra.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation (σ or s)
inputs.businessContext: Population standard deviation if known; otherwise sample standard deviation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Population standard deviation if known; otherwise sample standard deviation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Popülasyon standart sapması biliniyorsa; aksi halde örneklem standart sapması.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart-type de la population s'il est connu ; sinon écart-type de l'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar poblacional si se conoce; en caso contrario, desviación estándar muestral.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of independent observations. Must be > 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of independent observations. Must be > 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der unabhängigen Beobachtungen. Muss > 1 sein.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de observaciones independientes. Debe ser > 1.

inputs.label: Critical Value (z or t)
inputs.businessContext: Z-score for normal distribution (e.g., 1.96 for 95% CI) or t-score from t-distribution table.

businessContext_i18n.en: Z-score for normal distribution (e.g., 1.96 for 95% CI) or t-score from t-distribution table.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal dağılım için Z-skoru (ör. %95 GA için 1,96) veya t-dağılım tablosundan t-skoru.
businessContext_i18n.de: Z-Score für Normalverteilung (z. B. 1,96 für 95 % KI) oder t-Score aus t-Verteilungstabelle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score Z pour la distribution normale (ex. 1,96 pour IC 95 %) ou score t issu de la table de distribution t.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación z para distribución normal (ej., 1.96 para IC del 95%) o puntuación t de la tabla de distribución t.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
